shell.installPrompt: Add SkyWindow to your home screen for quick access.

language.label: Language
language.hint: Uses your phone language by default. Override here anytime.

sky.title: Sky profiles
sky.ledeBefore: Maps which parts of the sky you can see from your yard (trees, roofs, buildings). Used on
sky.label: Label
sky.stepCaptureDetail: 8 directions; tilt up to show sky (backyard mode).
sky.stepAnalyzeDetail: big purple button on the review screen (opens automatically at 8/8).
sky.stepSaveDetail: below, then pick it on Tonight.
sky.saveFinishError: Finish all 8 captures, tap Analyze horizon, then save.
sky.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
sky.noProfilesBefore: No saved profiles yet. Complete capture above, or open

capture.intro: Map what sky you can actually see from your yard. Stand in your observing spot and capture 8 directions (N → NW). Trees and buildings are expected — you are tracing what blocks the sky.
capture.aimLegend: How are you aiming the phone?
capture.modeSkyDetail: Mostly open sky in frame; treetops and rooflines along the bottom edge.
capture.modeHorizonDetail: Classic skyline — land meets sky across the frame.
capture.analyzedSave: Horizon analyzed — tap Save sky profile below.
capture.compassBlocked: Compass blocked — allow Motion & Orientation in browser settings
capture.turnHold: Hold steady — you are lined up.
capture.tipTiltDown: Tip: tilt the top of the phone toward you so the camera sees more sky (less house/ground).
capture.tipIncludeTreetops: Tip: include treetops or rooflines along the bottom of the frame.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.lede: Update how SkyWindow identifies you and the sky conditions at your usual observing spot.
profile.notifyHint: Requires installing SkyWindow as a PWA (“Add to Home Screen”) for reliable notifications.
profile.notifyHintNative: We check your skies around 8 pm local time and alert you when conditions look good for observing.
profile.notifyBlocked: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings, then try again.
profile.notifyBlockedNative: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in Settings → Apps → SkyWindow → Notifications, then try again.
profile.locationRequired: Set a valid location (GPS or coordinates).

verdict.title: Tonight’s verdict
verdict.noTargets: No targets found for your location yet.
verdict.reasonForecastMissing: Forecast data is unavailable — treat this as a cautious call.
verdict.reasonCloudHigh: Cloud cover looks high (~{{pct}} average) — you may lose most targets.
verdict.reasonCloudBuilding: Clear early, but clouds build later (up to ~{{pct}} toward dawn).
verdict.reasonSkiesClear: Skies look clear most of the night.
verdict.reasonCloudSome: Some clouds expected (~{{pct}} average) — keep an eye on it.
verdict.reasonMoonMissing: Moon illumination is unavailable — faint targets may be harder than expected.
verdict.reasonMoonDim: Moon is fairly dim — good for galaxies and nebulae.
verdict.reasonMoonMid: Moon is {{pct}} lit — faint galaxies will be tougher.
verdict.reasonMoonBright: Moon is {{pct}} lit — it will wash out faint fuzzies.
verdict.reasonNoVisible: No recommended targets are above your horizon tonight.
verdict.reasonStrongMany: You’ve got {{count}} strong targets (score > 60) above the horizon.
verdict.reasonDecentOne: You’ve got 1 decent target (score > 60) to try.
verdict.reasonDecentMany: You’ve got {{count}} decent targets (score > 60) to try.
verdict.reasonVisibleRough: You’ve got {{count}} visible targets, but conditions look rough for high-quality observing.

tonight.title: Tonight
tonight.usingProfileAfter: to hide targets behind your skyline.
tonight.selectSiteHint: Select your site (e.g. Home site) to apply your horizon mask.
tonight.missingEquipmentBefore: No equipment saved — using a 200mm visual default.
tonight.noMatchFilters: No targets match these filters tonight. Try turning off "Tonight only", choosing another type, or switching sky profile.
tonight.addedToPlan: Added {{name}} to your plan. Open Plan to schedule it.

conditions.heading: Conditions: {{label}}
conditions.noHourlyData: No hourly data for this window yet.
conditions.chartAria: Hourly cloud cover for the observing window

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.deleteConfirm: Delete session from {{date}}? This cannot be undone.
